report_name: Pharma Giant Novo Nordisk Discloses Data Breach Affecting Clinical Trial Participants

attack_patterns.name: Data from Local System
attack_patterns.description: The unauthorized third party collected and copied data related to clinical trials and healthcare professionals from Novo Nordisk's internal IT systems.

attack_patterns.name: Exfiltration Over C2 Channel
attack_patterns.description: The attackers exfiltrated the collected data, including pseudonymized patient information and healthcare professional PII, out of the Novo Nordisk network.

campaigns.name: Novo Nordisk Data Breach June 2026
campaigns.description: A data breach incident against Novo Nordisk, disclosed on June 12, 2026, where an unauthorized third party accessed internal systems and exfiltrated data related to clinical trials and healthcare professionals.
campaigns.objective: Data theft of clinical trial information and personal data of healthcare professionals.

identities.name: Novo Nordisk
identities.description: A Danish pharmaceutical company that was the victim of a data breach where attackers accessed internal IT systems and exfiltrated data related to clinical trials.

identities.name: Clinical Trial Participants
identities.description: A group of individuals participating in Novo Nordisk's clinical trials whose pseudonymized data, including patient IDs and health information, was exfiltrated in the breach.

identities.name: Healthcare Professionals
identities.description: Healthcare professionals associated with Novo Nordisk's clinical trials whose personally identifiable information (names, email addresses, phone numbers) was exfiltrated, placing them at high risk for targeted phishing attacks.

indicators.name: Targeted Phishing Impersonating Novo Nordisk
indicators.pattern:
title: Targeted Phishing Impersonating Novo Nordisk
id: 7c5b9d1a-2a3b-4c8d-9e0f-1a2b3c4d5e6f
status: experimental
description: Detects potential phishing emails impersonating Novo Nordisk, sent to healthcare professionals, as a likely follow-on attack after the data breach disclosed in June 2026.
references:
  - https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/pharmaceutical-giant-novo-nordisk-discloses-security-breach/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-06-13
tags:
  - attack.t1566
level: high
logsource:
  category: email
detection:
  selection_keywords:
    Subject|contains:
      - 'Novo Nordisk'
      - 'Ozempic'
      - 'Wegovy'
      - 'Clinical Trial'
    Body|contains:
      - 'Novo Nordisk'
      - 'Ozempic'
      - 'Wegovy'
      - 'Clinical Trial'
  selection_sender:
    From|contains:
      - 'novonordisk'
  filter_legit:
    From|endswith:
      - '@novonordisk.com'
  condition: (1 of selection_*) and not filter_legit
indicators.description: This indicator detects potential phishing campaigns targeting healthcare professionals by impersonating Novo Nordisk, a risk highlighted in the breach notification. It looks for emails containing keywords related to the company and its products, while attempting to filter out legitimate communications.
